plugins.name: tanstack-start
plugins.description: TanStack Start guidance for scaffolding examples, routing patterns, full-stack app structure, and agent-friendly implementation workflows

plugins.name: agent-web-interface
plugins.description: Semantic browser interface for LLM agents - token-efficient page snapshots via Puppeteer/CDP, with a skill for live page interaction

plugins.name: app-exploration
plugins.description: Shared feature mapping plus live product exploration and evidence capture for downstream testing workflows

plugins.name: test-analysis
plugins.description: Shared coverage planning, test-case generation, and spec review grounded in exploration evidence

plugins.name: exploratory-testing
plugins.description: Exploratory testing charters — frame risk hypotheses and investigation focus before coverage planning begins

plugins.name: smoke-testing
plugins.description: Smoke testing scopes — define the minimum critical-path confidence checks before selecting runnable automation

plugins.name: regression-testing
plugins.description: Regression testing scopes — define rerunnable confidence across changed and high-risk areas before automation selection

plugins.name: playwright-automation
plugins.description: Playwright execution layer for analysis, authoring, review, and flake repair; full workflows also require app-exploration and test-analysis

plugins.name: robot-automation
plugins.description: Robot Framework execution layer for analysis, authoring, review, and flake repair; full workflows also require app-exploration and test-analysis

plugins.name: site-knowledge
plugins.description: Site-specific automation patterns and knowledge for popular websites (Airbnb, Amazon, Apple Store)

plugins.name: md-export
plugins.description: Export markdown files to clean, dark-themed PDFs

plugins.name: frontend-design
plugins.description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Generates creative, polished code that avoids generic AI aesthetics.

plugins.name: shadcn
plugins.description: Browse, search, and install shadcn/ui components via the shadcn MCP server, plus project-aware knowledge of shadcn/ui patterns, theming, and registry authoring

plugins.name: web-bench
plugins.description: WebBench benchmark runner - executes real-world browser tasks from the Halluminate/WebBench dataset, scores via LLM-as-judge, and produces evaluation reports

plugins.name: matt-pocock-skills
plugins.description: Bundled non-deprecated skills from Matt Pocock's Skills For Real Engineers (https://github.com/mattpocock/skills): engineering skills plus caveman, handoff, write-a-skill, git-guardrails-claude-code, and setup-pre-commit.

plugins.name: workflow-builder
plugins.description: Scaffold complete Athena workflow packages with workflow definitions, plugin pins, marketplace registration, and validation gates

plugins.name: linear
plugins.description: Use Linear issues, projects, and workflow state from engineering agents via the official Linear MCP server

plugins.name: clickup
plugins.description: Use ClickUp tasks, lists, docs, and workspace state from agents via the official ClickUp MCP server

plugins.name: setup-engineering-workflow
plugins.description: Set up the engineering workflow's per-repo context: an `## Agent skills` block in AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md plus `docs/agents/` capturing the issue tracker (GitHub, GitLab, or local markdown), triage label vocabulary, and domain doc layout, with the full workflow skill map recorded as a reference inventory.
